text.message: Why am I being stolen from?
That’s insane man. That makes me want to report you for that crap
I just noticed what happened there. Hard to see on mobile
I was saying yeah as in he stole my brick
I didn’t see the knight played
And you better start soloing black blue or you are going to not win this game have chance
No but also no vp haha
How does that hurt blue dude???!??
Please cut his road potential or we get wiped.
You promised a no block and broke your word
What? I gave him the deal?
I thought he was asking if brick was stolen when I typed yeah… the. I still honored it the next turn.
You don’t play the first time
I’m on mobile.. only 2 lines of chat visible..
Blue won this game. When he got first pick. And you idiots aren’t blocking him seriously and doing dumb 10 brick blocks etc
I will solo oj too now
